applyHub.title: Application Hub
applyHub.subtitle: Everything you need to apply — documents, letters, and step-by-step guidance.
applyHub.clarifyTitle: This is your document & letter hub
applyHub.clarifyDesc: Store documents, generate motivation letters, and follow the application guide here. To track application status and let AI write letters per university, use your Pipeline.

locker.fileHint: PDF, Word, JPEG, PNG, WebP — max 20 MB
locker.empty: No documents yet. Upload your first document above.

letter.extraPlaceholder: e.g. I did an internship at a tech company, I won a math olympiad, etc.

guide.selectPlaceholder: Choose a university to see application steps…
guide.allDoneDesc: Your application to {{uni}} should now be submitted. Good luck!
guide.empty: Select a university above to see the step-by-step application guide.

uniAssist.s0desc: Go to uni-assist.de and register a new applicant account. Use your real name exactly as it appears in your passport.
uniAssist.s1desc: After logging in, click 'My Applications' → 'New Application'. Search for your target university by name.
uniAssist.s2desc: Enter your details below — click any field to copy it to your clipboard.
uniAssist.s3desc: Upload the required documents. You can download your documents from the Document Locker tab.
uniAssist.s4desc: The standard fee is €75 per application. Payment is via credit card or bank transfer on the uni-assist portal.
uniAssist.s5desc: Click 'Submit'. You'll receive a confirmation email. Track your status under 'My Applications' on uni-assist.de.

irk.s0desc: Go to the official application portal for {{uni}} and create an account.
irk.s1desc: Browse available programs and select the one that matches your field of interest and language level.
irk.s2desc: Enter your details — click any field to copy it to your clipboard.
irk.s3desc: Upload your transcript, language certificate, passport, and other required documents.
irk.s4desc: Review all details and click Submit. Save the confirmation number you receive.

ownPortal.s0desc: Go to the official application page for {{uni}}.
ownPortal.s1title: Create your account or log in
ownPortal.s1desc: Register using your email address. Some universities require your student ID or acceptance letter.
ownPortal.s2desc: Enter your details — click any field to copy it to your clipboard.
ownPortal.s3desc: Upload transcript, language certificate, CV, and any other required documents from your Document Locker.
ownPortal.s4desc: Submit your application and wait for a confirmation email. Track status via the portal.

A1.label: Beginner
A1.desc: Absolute basics — greetings, numbers, simple phrases.

B1.label: Intermediate
B1.desc: Handle most travel situations and simple texts.

B2.label: Upper-Intermediate
B2.desc: Interact fluently with native speakers on familiar topics.

C1.label: Advanced
C1.desc: Complex texts, professional and academic language.

features.certDesc: Earn a level certificate on completion

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: When will Premium and Pro plans be available?
faq.a1: We are finalizing our pricing and feature sets. Sign up for free and you will be the first to know when paid plans launch.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Once paid plans are live, you will be able to upgrade directly from your dashboard with no data loss.
faq.q3: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
faq.a3: Details about trials will be announced when the paid plans launch. Stay tuned.
faq.q4: What payment methods will be accepted?
faq.a4: We plan to support all major credit/debit cards and popular payment gateways. Exact methods will be confirmed at launch.

danger.logoutDesc: Sign out of your UniPath account

welcome.title: Welcome to UniPath
welcome.desc: UniPath helps you find the best universities, scholarships, language resources, and study opportunities based on your profile and goals.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.desc: Fill in your information such as your academic grade, budget, preferred country, and language level so we can recommend the best universities for your situation.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: This is your main dashboard where you'll find everything related to your activity and progress inside UniPath.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.desc: This is where we recommend the best universities based on your profile, budget, academic performance, and preferences.

universities.title: Universities
universities.desc: Browse all available universities in your preferred country if you'd like to explore more options beyond our recommendations.

scholarships.title: Scholarships
scholarships.desc: If there are scholarships that match your profile, we will recommend them here to help reduce your study costs.

pipeline.title: Application Pipeline
pipeline.desc: Add universities to your pipeline and let AI instantly analyze your fit, identify profile gaps, and write a personalized motivation letter — all automatically.

applyHub.title: Application Hub
applyHub.desc: Store your documents in the Document Locker, generate AI-powered motivation letters for any university, and get a step-by-step application guide tailored to each university's portal.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.desc: Ask our AI anything about universities, scholarships, visa requirements, or study abroad tips. Available 24/7 to guide you through your journey.

learning.title: Learning Center
learning.desc: Take a placement test to discover your language level, then follow structured A1–C2 courses with video lessons, PDF materials, and quizzes.

instructors.title: Instructors
instructors.desc: Browse available instructors and send them direct messages if you need additional support or private guidance on your application.

favourites.title: Favorites
favourites.desc: Save universities you're interested in and access them later from your Favorites list.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.desc: Compare available plans and discover the features included in each subscription.

ready.title: You're All Set!
ready.desc: You're now ready to explore UniPath and start your study abroad journey. Good luck! 🎉
